items: Jacob Misiorowski blanked Philadelphia for 9.0 innings, striking out 15 in Milwaukee's 6-0 win.
Bo Bichette homered 2 times, driving in 6 as The Mets beat Atlanta, 7-5.
Yordan Alvarez homered 2 times, driving in 6 as Houston beat Kansas City, 10-8.
Jacob Misiorowski struck out 15 in 9.0 innings as Milwaukee topped Philadelphia, 6-0.
Bo Bichette had 6 RBI, with 2 home runs as The Mets beat Atlanta, 7-5.
Yordan Alvarez had 6 RBI, with 2 home runs as Houston beat Kansas City, 10-8.
Minnesota walked off St. Louis, 9-8 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
